title: T-010 — SET-007 Completion Celebration page
prompt:
Implement SET-007 Completion Celebration page at `/onboarding/6` per PRD §14.3 step 6 + §14.4 SET-007. On render: trigger confetti animation (canvas-confetti or framer-motion), call updateOnboardingState({current_step:6, completed_steps: [...prev, 6]}) once, then render a 3-card grid linking to: Module Toggles (`/admin/features`), Schema Browser (`/admin/schema`), Rules Registry (`/admin/rules`).

Must be idempotent — refreshing the page does not re-fire updateOnboardingState if step 6 already in completed_steps.

RED: `pnpm --filter web test -- onboarding-step6`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Final page: confetti + 3 next-step cards; advances state to completed.
pipeline_inputs.details: Use `canvas-confetti` or shared <Confetti/> primitive. Cards use shadcn <Card>. Idempotency via useEffect guard checking completed_steps.includes(6).
out_of_scope: Building the target admin pages /admin/features etc.
acceptance_criteria: Given completed_steps does NOT include 6, when /onboarding/6 first renders, then updateOnboardingState fires once and confetti animation triggers.
Given completed_steps already includes 6, when page re-renders, then updateOnboardingState is NOT called again (idempotency).
Given page rendered, when DOM is queried, then exactly 3 anchor elements exist with hrefs /admin/features, /admin/schema, /admin/rules.
Given vitest+RTL covers above, when pnpm --filter web test runs, then 0 failures.
risk_red_lines: Do not double-fire updateOnboardingState on remount.
Do not block render if confetti library fails to load (must be progressive enhancement).
